Class BatchWithIncubator

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo.BatchWithIncubator
public class BatchWithIncubator extends Object
Database view that combines batch data with its associated incubator details.

This view exposes batch fields along with the incubator name and model for use in list and summary presentations.
